claim_boundary: QA regression harness only. It does not create legal advice, financial advice, binding terms, compliance certification, production validation, automated verdict, free pilot commitment, autonomous client action, truth validation, or hidden-mechanism claim.
closeout_note: SpecShift QA Regression Harness complete as an internal workstation regression scaffold.

phases.completion_note: Core pytest suite created and passed before workplan update.
phases.goal: Create initial pytest tests for claim logic, audit gate, delivery packet, and evidence ledger.

phases.completion_note: specshift_qa command created and passed pytest plus core smoke checks before workplan update.
phases.goal: Create a single specshift_qa command that runs pytest and selected smoke checks.

phases.completion_note: Advisory lint/style gate documented and reports recorded after specshift_qa passed.
phases.goal: Add ruff/shellcheck-safe QA guidance without making style failures block business work too early.

phases.completion_note: QA audit and closeout completed after required artifacts, prior phase reports, pytest real tests, and specshift_qa passed.
phases.goal: Close only after pytest collects and passes real tests.

purpose: Turn trusted SpecShift scripts and safety boundaries into repeatable pytest regression tests.
